vocab.example: To me, a watch is more than a timepiece; it's a versatile fashion accessory that complements my outfit.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp về cơ khí
vocab.example: I am fascinated by the mechanical intricacy of Swiss watches, even if I cannot afford one yet.

vocab.meaning: vật gia bảo / đồ vật gia truyền
vocab.example: I wear a vintage Omega that was passed down as a family heirloom from my grandfather.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: This watch holds great sentimental value for me because it was a graduation gift from my parents.
Wearing a watch helps me maintain a high level of punctuality throughout my hectic workday.
As a budding horological enthusiast, I appreciate the craftsmanship that goes into traditional automatic watches.
Checking the time on a watch is a distraction-free alternative to pulling out a smartphone.

vocab.meaning: đồng hồ bấm giờ / thiết bị đo thời gian chính xác
vocab.example: I use a high-end digital chronometer during my morning runs to track my splits accurately.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công tinh xảo
vocab.example: High-end luxury watches are often admired for their exquisite craftsmanship and attention to detail.

vocab.meaning: một món đồ thiết yếu/cơ bản
vocab.example: A classic leather-strap watch has become an essential staple in my daily wardrobe.
